title: Cobbleworks [Cobblemon]
description: A Cobblemon add-on used in the Forge & Fables modpack!
body:
# Cobbleworks This mod onto the existing Cobblemon roster with custom Fakemons! These will be unique in design, moveset, abilities and sometimes even typing. These custom made Fakemons will pack quite a punch and will definitely be an awesome addition to your playthrough!

## Variants At this time, only the Wardevoir and Darkquaza have a custom _**unique**_ variant, that you can spawn in with a command _(listed in the command section below)_. I am planning to add more in the future!

## Commands Here are some commands to help you get started with spawning _**unique**_ variants of our custom Fakemons; - /pokespawn wardevoir unique=true level=(your desired level) - _ex: /pokespawn wardevoir unique=true level=70_ ## Seramoss While making Seramoss I hadn't thought of a name until I finished the entire model, including animations; due to this, her "codename" is _ladyleaf_, please use the command below if you wish to spawn her! - /pokespawn ladyleaf level=(your desired level)
